species: A muddy sample of fresh water collected in a pond near Noumea airport (New Caledonia) treated with antibiotics triggered a lytic infection phenotype on a culture of Acanthamoeba castellanii cells.
cell_type: A muddy sample of fresh water collected in a pond near Noumea airport (New Caledonia) treated with antibiotics triggered a lytic infection phenotype on a culture of Acanthamoeba castellanii cells.
sample_source: fresh water sample collected in a pond near Noumea Airport
Noumeavirus was isolated from a muddy fresh water sample collected in a pond near Noumea Airport (New Caledonia, Lat: 22° 16′ 29.50′′ S, Long: 166° 28′ 11.61′′ E).
cell_line: A. castellanii (Douglas) Neff (ATCC 30010TM) cells adapted to Fungizone (2.5 μg ml−1) were inoculated with 100 μl of the supernatant...
